title: Optimize upload flow, center-align menu items, and update post control icons

requirements.text: Add comprehensive error handling to the useCreatePost mutation hook in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts to catch and display clear error messages when post creation fails, including network errors, authorization failures, and validation errors

quotes: Uploads sometimes fail or get stuck and the post/media does not appear after submission. There are no clear error messages shown. Please optimize the upload flow, handling, and performance so uploads work reliably every time.

acceptanceCriteria: Error messages are displayed to users when upload fails
Different error types (network, auth, validation) show specific messages
Users can understand what went wrong and how to fix it

requirements.text: Add loading state indicators to the post creation form in frontend/src/pages/CreatePostPage.tsx that show when a post is being submitted, disable the submit button during upload, and provide visual feedback that the operation is in progress

quotes: Uploads sometimes fail or get stuck and the post/media does not appear after submission.

acceptanceCriteria: Submit button is disabled while upload is in progress
Loading spinner or indicator is visible during submission
Form fields are disabled during submission to prevent duplicate submissions

requirements.text: Add retry logic with exponential backoff to the useCreatePost mutation in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts to automatically retry failed uploads up to 3 times before showing an error, improving reliability for intermittent network issues

quotes: Please optimize the upload flow, handling, and performance so uploads work reliably every time.

acceptanceCriteria: Failed uploads are automatically retried up to 3 times
Retry delays increase exponentially (e.g., 1s, 2s, 4s)
Error is only shown after all retry attempts are exhausted

requirements.text: Add form validation to the post creation form in frontend/src/pages/CreatePostPage.tsx that validates required fields (title, description, content) before submission and displays inline validation errors for missing or invalid data

quotes: Please optimize the upload flow, handling, and performance so uploads work reliably every time.

acceptanceCriteria: Required fields show error messages if empty on submit
Image URL is validated as a proper URL format when provided
Form cannot be submitted until all validation passes

requirements.text: Update the useCreatePost mutation in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts to automatically invalidate and refetch the posts query immediately after successful post creation, ensuring the new post appears in the homepage list without manual refresh

quotes: posts/media does not appear after submission
Please optimize the upload flow, handling, and performance so uploads work reliably every time.

acceptanceCriteria: New posts appear in the homepage list immediately after creation
No manual page refresh is required to see new posts
Post list is sorted correctly with newest posts first

requirements.text: Add success toast notification in frontend/src/pages/CreatePostPage.tsx that displays when a post is successfully created, providing clear feedback that the upload completed and the post was saved

quotes: Please optimize the upload flow, handling, and performance so uploads work reliably every time.

acceptanceCriteria: Success message displays when post is created
Message confirms the post was saved successfully
Toast notification auto-dismisses after a few seconds

requirements.text: Update the three-dot menu dropdown in frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx to center-align all menu items (Home, Contact Us, Privacy Policy) vertically for a clean, centered list presentation

quotes: Please align the menu items properly from the left side to the center
I want the menu items to be center-aligned in the three-dot menu. All items should be evenly centered (not left-aligned), like a clean vertical center list

acceptanceCriteria: All menu items are center-aligned horizontally in the dropdown
Alignment is consistent across all menu items
Menu maintains clean, polished appearance

requirements.text: Replace the existing Edit icon button in frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx with a pencil icon (using lucide-react Pencil component), maintaining its position at the top of the post card, developer-only visibility, and all existing edit functionality including form pre-fill

quotes: Use a pencil icon for the Edit action

Yes, the pencil icon (Edit) and trash icon (Delete) should replace the existing icon buttons at the top of each post. These are the same developer-only controls, just with the correct icons and clean UI.

acceptanceCriteria: Edit button displays a pencil icon instead of current icon
Icon is positioned at the top of the post card
Only visible to authenticated admin users
Clicking opens the edit dialog with pre-filled post data

requirements.text: Replace the existing Delete icon button in frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx with a trash/delete icon (using lucide-react Trash2 component), maintaining its position at the top of the post card, developer-only visibility, and all existing delete functionality including confirmation dialog

quotes: Use a trash/delete icon for the Delete action

Yes, the pencil icon (Edit) and trash icon (Delete) should replace the existing icon buttons at the top of each post. These are the same developer-only controls, just with the correct icons and clean UI.

acceptanceCriteria: Delete button displays a trash icon instead of current icon
Icon is positioned at the top of the post card
Only visible to authenticated admin users
Clicking opens the delete confirmation dialog

constraints: Do not modify the useInternetIdentity hook in frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts
Do not modify the useActor hook in frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts
Do not modify any UI components in frontend/src/components/ui
Preserve existing admin authorization logic for edit and delete operations
Do not change the post data model in backend/main.mo
nonGoals: Implementing file upload capabilities for images (only URL input is supported)
Adding advanced image processing or compression
Implementing offline support or PWA features
Adding analytics or tracking for upload success rates
